plugins.name: ado-task-analyzer
plugins.description: Fetch work items from Azure DevOps query, analyze intent from descriptions, explore codebase to locate issues, then post execution plans or clarification requests as comments.

plugins.name: playwright-cli
plugins.description: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction.

plugins.name: gdpr-cookieyes-audit
plugins.description: Audit websites for GDPR Prior Consent violations — detecting third-party tracking scripts, iframes, and network requests that fire before CookieYes consent is given.
